title: mostacillastrum andinum
intro: Mostacillastrum andinum, also known as Queñua, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the Andes region of South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Mostacillastrum andinum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusion, and tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
